Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Clayton Kent, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) Lurlene Cannon et al,

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Funerals by Washington et al for Judgment as follows:

Punitive Damages $9,000,000.00
Total judgment in the amount of $9,000,000.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
